title: psacalium thyrsoideum
intro: Psacalium thyrsoideum, also known as Mexican horse gentian, is a flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating wounds, as well as offering potential protection against certain diseases. Psacalium thyrsoideum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to address various health concerns.
